examples: The gang worked for up to ten hours with acetylene torches to open the vault.
The bimolecular proton-bound complex between benzyne and acetylene intermediate has been proposed.
In a corner of the cafe, an acetylene lamp gives a flickering light.
When I ask one of them, Tin Tun Maung, about policy debate and decision-making, an acetylene anger flares in his eyes.
Two neighbouring homes were evacuated and a 200m exclusion zone was put in place amid fears there are acetylene cylinders inside the buildings.
